CreateIpGroup.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
CreateIpGroup.name: Name of the IP address group. Allowed characters: uppercase and lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_/. Must start with a letter or Chinese character. Length: 1–65.
CreateIpGroup.ipVersion: IP version. Valid values: IPv4 or IPv6.
CreateIpGroup.ipAddressInfo: IP address information for the parameter template. Up to 10 entries can be specified per request.
CreateIpGroup.ipAddressInfo.ipAddress: IP address for the parameter template. Can be a specific IP address or a CIDR block.
CreateIpGroup.ipAddressInfo.description: Description of the parameter template IP address.
CreateIpGroup.description: Description of the IP address group. Maximum length: 255 characters.
